given: Sentry group events endpoint receives a Snuba timeout or query error

should_find.finding: the group events endpoint does not wrap the Snuba query with handle_query_errors, so Snuba timeouts surface as unhandled 500s instead of API error responses such as 504

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix fd0299d864ff7b2b0a5ff69595eb679ea2f97471. the group events endpoint does not wrap the Snuba query with handle_query_errors, so Snuba timeouts surface as unhandled 500s instead of API error responses such as 504
